cleric.description: Domain spells — pick one focus spell from your deity's domain at level 1 via the Domain Initiate class feat. Costs Focus Points instead of slots.

samples.name: Sudden Shift
samples.desc: After being missed by a melee attack, Step and become concealed against the attacker (Trickery domain).

samples.name: Touch of Undeath
samples.desc: Touch a living creature for 1d6 negative damage + 1 round of clumsy (Death domain).

samples.name: Practiced Defender
samples.desc: Gain +1 status to AC for 1 round (Protection domain).

samples.name: Soothing Words
samples.desc: Ally regains 2d6 HP and gains +1 status to Will (Healing domain).

bard.description: Composition cantrips and compositions — bardic magic distinct from spell slots. All bards know Inspire Courage at level 1.

samples.name: Inspire Courage
samples.desc: Allies in 60 ft gain +1 status to attacks, damage, and fear saves while you sustain (composition cantrip — all bards).

samples.name: Lingering Composition
samples.desc: Your compositions last 3 rounds instead of 1 (Maestro/Warrior focus spell).

samples.name: Counter Performance
samples.desc: When ally fails a save vs. emotion/auditory/visual, use your Performance check as their save.

wizard.description: Wizards don't get focus spells by default. Thesis (Improved Familiar Attunement) and some class feats can grant access to focus magic.
